name: Hamza
experience: 10+ years in software development. Started as a .NET developer for 6 years at Yazılım Bornova building enterprise web apps. Then moved into training and teaching for 2 years at Bemka Kariyer and İTK. Became Software Development Manager at REA Teknoloji where I scaled team from 20 to 90+ members and managed 30+ projects for big clients like Borusan Otomotiv, Madame Coco, and Robert College. Then managed 8-person team at Qtech as Tech Lead. Most recently led 20-person team at Amatis focusing on infrastructure modernization.
skills: C#, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, T-SQL, .NET, .NET Core, Node.js, SignalR, MS SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, Azure, AWS EC2, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, CI/CD, Apache Kafka, Domain-Driven Design, Microservices, RESTful APIs, Agile, Neural Networks, NLP, Machine Learning Pipelines, Git, JIRA, Azure DevOps
key_achievements: Scaled engineering team from 20 to 90+ members at REA Teknoloji
Managed 30+ simultaneous projects for enterprise clients including Borusan Otomotiv, Madame Coco, Canik Arms, Robert College
Reduced production incidents by 35% through quality control processes at Amatis
Improved project delivery timelines by 25% at Qtech through Agile optimization
Reduced junior developer onboarding time by 40% with mentorship program
Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time across organization
Trained Computer Engineering and Software Engineering students in .NET and web technologies
Led technology events, drone development and 3D printing workshops for students
management_style: Collaborative, data-driven, focused on team growth. Regular workshops, knowledge-sharing sessions, structured training programs, code reviews, and mentorship for junior developers.
education: Bachelor's Degree in Computer and Teaching Technologies, Ege University, İzmir (2015)
why_this_company: I want to apply for the Senior Python Developer role at EPAM. I have a lot of experience with Python and cloud systems. I am happy to work on your new projects. I really like EPAM's focus on learning and training. I look forward to working with a global team and building great software in a fast-growing company.
job_posting: We are seeking a Senior Python Developer to join our team. You will play a crucial role in developing and maintaining software solutions, leveraging your expertise in Python and full-stack technologies. If you are passionate about coding and eager to make an impact, we encourage you to apply.
Develop software applications using Python and React
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define project requirements
Design and implement scalable and efficient cloud solutions using AWS or Azure
Perform code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards
Troubleshoot and debug applications to optimize performance
Participate in the full software development lifecycle
Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends
5 years of experience in Python programming
Proficiency in React for front-end development
Understanding of cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure
Ability to work effectively in a team environment
Fluent English communication skills at a B2+ level
Assessment center for objective review of competency level
Access to learning platforms including more than 2,500 internal courses and the LinkedIn Learning library with 20,000+ courses
English courses taught by certified teachers
Microsoft's Software Assurance Home Use Program (HUP)

EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.
